headline: Today's top AI story: [AINews] not much happened today
bullets: Moonshot's Kimi K3 outperforms Fable 5 in frontend code but lags far behind in complex math
Brazil courts confront AI prompt injection attempts by lawyers - tovima.com
Hugging Face says it used the open-weight GLM-5.2 hosted on its own compute for breach forensics, after US frontier model safety guardrails blocked the requests (Edward Targett/The Stack)
